Notes: Primary key preservation. Non-negotiable — needed for reconciliation, re-runs, and resolving Warehouse references from other domains (e.g., StorageLocations.Warehouse, PurchaseOrders.Warehouse).

Short warehouse code (e.g., "MAIN", "WH01"). Odoo's code field is the "Short Name" used to identify the warehouse — direct semantic match. Caveat: Odoo convention favors short codes (historically ≤5 chars); verify Exact codes fit or plan a truncation strategy during migration.
Human-readable warehouse name → Odoo's main display name for stock.warehouse. Direct semantic match.
Maps to company. Single-division migration → hardcode to target company.

Flag for the primary warehouse. There's always exactly one main warehouse per Exact administration. Stored as boolean for audit. Also drives a Derived sequence (sequence=1 when Main=True) — see Derived rows below.

Mirrors the Exact UseStorageLocations flag. Indicates whether the warehouse uses discrete storage locations. Stored as audit reference; does not itself trigger automatic stock.location creation — StorageLocations are mapped separately (see InventoryStorageLocations sheet). NOTE: existing field help text says "False for all warehouses in the current migration" — revisit this text if storage locations are actually being migrated now.

GUID of the default StorageLocation in Exact. Stored as char (not resolved to stock.location) to avoid a circular dependency during migration (warehouse needs a default location; locations are parented under the warehouse). Post-migration reconciliation can cross-link this to the imported stock.location via x_aa_exact_id if needed.
Email address associated with the warehouse (contact/notifications). No native email field on stock.warehouse — custom.

Exact user GUID of the warehouse manager. No native "manager" field on stock.warehouse. Stored as char for reference — not resolved to res.users (user mapping pending). Post-migration reconciliation can resolve once users are mapped.
Audit: creation timestamp.
Audit field. Lookup user GUID → res.users. Default to admin if unmapped. Dependency: user mapping not yet done.
Audit: last modification timestamp.
Audit field. Lookup user GUID → res.users. Default to admin if unmapped. Dependency: user mapping not yet done.
Denormalized display copy of Creator.
Denormalized display copy of Modifier.
Denormalized display copy of DefaultStorageLocation.
Denormalized display copy of DefaultStorageLocation.
Derived from Main: Main=True → sequence=1 (makes this the primary/default warehouse in the Odoo UI); other warehouses → auto-assigned by Odoo. Behavior documented in the x_aa_is_main field help.
Required. Default to 'one_step' (direct receipt into stock). Exact does not model reception routing on the warehouse entity — choose default based on customer operational requirements.
Required. Default to 'ship_only' (direct shipping from stock). Exact does not model delivery routing on the warehouse entity.
Required. Default to 'mrp_one_step'. Only meaningful if the MRP module is active, but the field is still required on the model.

Required. Auto-created by Odoo when a warehouse is created — the "view" parent location that contains all child locations for this warehouse. Do not set manually during import; let Odoo's warehouse creation hook populate it.

Required. Auto-created by Odoo when a warehouse is created — the main internal Stock location. Exact StorageLocations will be reparented under this location (see InventoryStorageLocations sheet). Do not set manually during import.
Warehouse address. Exact does not store warehouse addresses on the warehouse entity. Leave empty or default to the company's partner record during migration.
